name: gurney-everyday-assistant
description: Unified everyday assistant: calendar, tasks, reminders, weather, briefings, day-planning, and learned routines

name: gurney-voice
description: Two-way Telegram voice: Piper TTS replies + whisper.cpp voice-note transcription

name: gurney-instant-responses
description: Templated instant replies for trivial chatter and tool-dispatch acknowledgements

name: gurney-speaker
description: Handmade smart-speaker front-end: WebSocket server for ESP32-S3 puck devices, reuses gurney-voice for STT/TTS
